_provenance.note: Real-Anvil-Base baseline for the lp_v4 fixture after the V0 closer. Movement vs the previous lp_v4 baseline (10/5/6/1 captured during PR #2339 review): G3 FAIL->PASS and G13 FAIL->PASS (VIB-4534 canonical PoolKey seed unblocked the historical-pool lookup so V4 LP_CLOSE now emits a yield event and pool_address carries the canonical 32-byte PoolId hash). LP4 FAIL->XFAIL (accountant_test reclassified IL_USD divergence as XFAIL once attribution wired through; V1 fee separation will flip it to PASS). G6 and LP3 remain FAIL: both require fee/principal separation from PoolManager.getPositionInfo (V1 work, VIB-4482 / P-V1-A) — see diagnostics: G6 'component buckets contain unmeasured nulls: Sigma_swaps_usd_null_count=2, Sigma_lp_fees_null_count=1'; LP3 'no fees_token0/1 on any position_event'. L5_22 remains XFAIL (registry mode not yet toggled on, independent of V4). These two cells are V0-honest non-PASSes locked in this baseline so V1 progress (VIB-4482) can demonstrate forward motion.
